Package noppes.npcs.api.event

Interface IAbilityEvent

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ICustomNPCsEvent, INpcEvent
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAbilityEvent.CompleteEvent, IAbilityEvent.ExecuteEvent, IAbilityEvent.HitEvent, IAbilityEvent.InterruptEvent, IAbilityEvent.StartEvent, IAbilityEvent.TickEvent, IAbilityEvent.ToggleEvent, IAbilityEvent.ToggleUpdateEvent
    public interface IAbilityEvent
extends INpcEvent
    Events related to NPC ability execution. These events are fired during the ability lifecycle.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.CompleteEvent
      Fired when an ability completes its full execution cycle.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.ExecuteEvent
      Fired when an ability enters the ACTIVE phase and performs its effect.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.HitEvent
      Fired when an ability hits an entity with damage.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.InterruptEvent
      Fired when an ability is interrupted by damage.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.StartEvent
      Fired when an ability starts executing (enters WINDUP phase).
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.TickEvent
      Fired every tick while an ability is executing.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.ToggleEvent
      Fired when a toggle ability is switched ON or OFF.
      static interface  IAbilityEvent.ToggleUpdateEvent
      Fired every 10 ticks for each active toggle ability.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.ICustomNPCsEvent

        ICustomNPCsEvent.CNPCNaturalSpawnEvent, ICustomNPCsEvent.ScriptedCommandEvent

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.INpcEvent

        INpcEvent.CollideEvent, INpcEvent.DamagedEvent, INpcEvent.DialogClosedEvent, INpcEvent.DialogEvent, INpcEvent.DiedEvent, INpcEvent.InitEvent, INpcEvent.InteractEvent, INpcEvent.KilledEntityEvent, INpcEvent.MeleeAttackEvent, INpcEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent, INpcEvent.SwingEvent, INpcEvent.TargetEvent, INpcEvent.TargetLostEvent, INpcEvent.TimerEvent, INpcEvent.UpdateEvent

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IAbility getAbility()
      Get the ability involved in this event.
      IEntityLivingBase getEntity()
      Get the entity executing the ability (NPC or Player).
      IPlayer getPlayer()
      Get the player executing the ability, or null if the caster is an NPC.
      IEntityLivingBase getTarget()
      Get the target of the ability, or null if no target.
      boolean isNPC()
      Whether the entity executing the ability is an NPC.

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.ICustomNPCsEvent

        getHookName

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.INpcEvent

        getNpc

    • Method Detail

      • getEntity

        IEntityLivingBase getEntity()
        Get the entity executing the ability (NPC or Player).
        Returns:
        the entity executing the ability

      • getPlayer

        IPlayer getPlayer()
        Get the player executing the ability, or null if the caster is an NPC.
        Returns:
        the player executing the ability, or null if NPC

      • isNPC

        boolean isNPC()
        Whether the entity executing the ability is an NPC.
        Returns:
        true if the executor is an NPC

      • getAbility

        IAbility getAbility()
        Get the ability involved in this event.
        Returns:
        the ability being executed

      • getTarget

        IEntityLivingBase getTarget()
        Get the target of the ability, or null if no target.
        Returns:
        the current target entity
